requirement_topic.en: Local Fiji Authorised Importer / Agent Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: 斐济本地授权进口商/代理要求
requirement_topic.zht: 斐濟本地授權進口商/代理要求

summary.en: A local Fiji-based authorised importer or agent is required to bring wireless and electronic devices into the Fiji market. The importer bears responsibility for customs import declarations, payment of applicable duties and taxes (Fiji Revenue and Customs Service, FRCS), and compliance with TRR type approval conditions and any applicable Fiji Bureau of Standards requirements. TRR type approval is ordinarily held by or granted to the local agent or importer acting on behalf of the overseas manufacturer. There is no publicly administered national responsible supplier registration scheme in Fiji equivalent to Australia's EESS Responsible Supplier Register, but the practical function is performed by the local importer's role under TRR and customs frameworks.
summary.zh: 向斐济市场引入无线及电子设备，须由斐济本地授权进口商或代理负责。进口商须承担海关进口申报、缴纳适用关税及税款（斐济税务与海关局，FRCS）、遵守TRR型号认证条件及斐济标准局相关要求等责任。TRR型号认证通常由代表境外制造商行事的本地代理或进口商持有或向其授予。斐济没有与澳大利亚EESS责任供应商登记相当的公开国家责任供应商注册制度，但本地进口商在TRR及海关框架下所承担的角色实质上发挥了类似功能。
summary.zht: 向斐濟市場引入無線及電子設備，須由斐濟本地授權進口商或代理負責。進口商須承擔海關進口申報、繳納適用關稅及稅款（斐濟稅務與海關局，FRCS）、遵守TRR型號認證條件及斐濟標準局相關要求等責任。TRR型號認證通常由代表境外製造商行事的本地代理或進口商持有或向其授予。斐濟沒有與澳洲EESS責任供應商登記相當的公開國家責任供應商登記制度，但本地進口商在TRR及海關框架下所承擔的角色實質上發揮了類似功能。

standards_or_laws: Fiji Revenue and Customs Service (FRCS) — import declaration and duties requirements
TRR Type Approval Framework — type approval ordinarily held by local importer or agent
Fiji Commerce Commission Act — trade and distribution regulation
Fiji Investment Act — requirements for foreign business operations in Fiji

summary.en: Chinese exporters are not required to appoint a local agent in Fiji for the purpose of domestic Chinese export procedures. Chinese export customs clearance (GACC) and export licensing (MOFCOM) for controlled goods are the relevant China-side obligations. The Chinese manufacturer or exporter declares goods for export but has no standing with Fiji TRR or customs unless they appoint a Fiji-based representative.
summary.zh: 中国出口商在办理中国境内出口手续时，无需在斐济指定本地代理。中国一侧的相关义务包括：出口海关清关（海关总署）及受管制商品的出口许可（商务部）。中国制造商或出口商负责申报出口货物，但若未在斐济指定代表，则在斐济TRR或海关机构面前不具备主体资格。
summary.zht: 中國出口商在辦理中國境內出口手續時，無需在斐濟指定本地代理。中國一側的相關義務包括：出口海關清關（海關總署）及受管制商品的出口許可（商務部）。中國製造商或出口商負責申報出口貨物，但若未在斐濟指定代表，則在斐濟TRR或海關機構面前不具備主體資格。

standards_or_laws: GACC (General Administration of Customs China) — export customs declaration
MOFCOM export licensing — for controlled wireless and telecom equipment exports
SRRC / MIIT — Chinese domestic approval obligations (not transferable to Fiji)

gap.en: Chinese exporters must identify and appoint a Fiji-based authorised importer or commercial agent before shipping wireless or telecom terminal equipment to Fiji. The local agent typically applies for TRR type approval on behalf of the manufacturer, handles Fiji customs import clearance, and takes on local compliance responsibility. This is a separate business arrangement that must be established before the product enters the Fiji market. Without a local importer or agent, TRR type approval cannot be obtained in-country and goods may be detained at customs.
gap.zh: 中国出口商在向斐济发货无线或电信终端设备前，须物色并指定斐济本地授权进口商或商业代理。本地代理通常代表制造商申请TRR型号认证、办理斐济海关进口清关手续，并承担本地合规责任。这是一项必须在产品进入斐济市场前建立的独立商业安排。若无本地进口商或代理，则无法在当地取得TRR型号认证，货物亦可能在海关被扣押。
gap.zht: 中國出口商在向斐濟發貨無線或電信終端設備前，須物色並指定斐濟本地授權進口商或商業代理。本地代理通常代表製造商申請TRR型號認證、辦理斐濟海關進口清關手續，並承擔本地合規責任。這是一項必須在產品進入斐濟市場前建立的獨立商業安排。若無本地進口商或代理，則無法在當地取得TRR型號認證，貨物亦可能在海關被扣押。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a local Fiji authorised importer or agent is required for customs import and TRR type approval; no formal national responsible supplier registration scheme equivalent to EESS exists in Fiji
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable for domestic China supply; Chinese export customs and MOFCOM procedures apply for outbound shipment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A local Fiji authorised importer or agent is required before wireless or telecom terminal equipment can enter the Fiji market. The importer typically holds the TRR type approval and bears customs and compliance responsibility. Chinese exporters must establish this arrangement before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无线或电信终端设备进入斐济市场前，须指定斐济本地授权进口商或代理。进口商通常持有TRR型号认证，并承担海关及合规责任。中国出口商须在发货前建立此安排。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無線或電信終端設備進入斐濟市場前，須指定斐濟本地授權進口商或代理。進口商通常持有TRR型號認證，並承擔海關及合規責任。中國出口商須在發貨前建立此安排。
